scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: cd fastapi-agents && uv run python -m pytest
scripts.test:backend:coverage: cd fastapi-agents && uv run python -m pytest --cov
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:frontend:unit
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: cd fastapi-agents && uv run ruff check .
